score_types.label: Advancement Track VP
score_types.description: Victory points from goods on your advancement track based on slot position values

score_types.label: Building VP
score_types.description: 1 point per building owned (houses, star houses, key houses, outposts, starting house)

score_types.label: Reputation VP
score_types.description: Points from reputation ranking (5/3/2 for 1st/2nd/3rd) plus track position VP

score_types.label: Card Bonus VP
score_types.description: Bonus points printed on building cards (flat VP and conditional VP)

score_types.label: Ingredient Track VP
score_types.description: Points from ingredient track cubes (1 common, 2 uncommon, 4 rare)

score_types.label: Pearl VP
score_types.description: Each pearl counts as your highest-valued good type for scoring
